title: Octarrhena nana
taxonomy: Octarrhena nana is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a small, terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of the Pacific. The genus Octarrhena is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes many species of terrestrial orchids. Octarrhena nana is further classified within the tribe Diurideae, a group of orchids that are primarily found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the Pacific and Australia. The classification of Octarrhena nana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
